desc: Amma Superstar is interactive cooking series where people from various walks of life across India nominate their mothers who created scrumptious food. Chef Pallavi chats with the nominator and nominee.

title: 100 Percent Veg S02
desc: Takes viewers on a vibrant vegetarian culinary journey across India. Each episode celebrates fresh, seasonal produce with creative recipes and expert tips.

title: The Great Indian Rasoi Show S02
desc: Chefs and locals share age-old recipes, unraveling traditions and emotions, as food becomes a bridge connecting hearts across diverse Indian cultures and regions.

title: Safari India
desc: Top Australian chefs judge aspiring cooks in intense culinary battles, where participants sharpen their skills to compete for the prestigious title of the nation's best chef.

title: India's 50 Best Dishes S03
desc: Chef Smit Sagar travels through the aromatic lanes of various cities across India and brings you some of the most unique and delectable street food recipes.

title: Dream Kitchen
desc: Cooking is only one of the activities in the kitchen. But to upgrade oneself from an okay cook to a great one, one has to be equipped with genius hacks, tricks and tips to manage an everyday kitchen.

title: Ghar Sa Yummy
desc: The chef demonstrates how to cook delicious, mouth-watering dishes using easy recipes and simple, everyday ingredients that anyone can recreate at home without much effort.

title: I Want To Bake Free
desc: The show explores the nuanced world of baking and simplifies the daunting aspects of baking for viewers. The show will feature an episode dedicated to baking recipes that can be tried by children.

title: Rewind With Rakhee
desc: A nostalgic journey where delightful stories and cherished recipes from the past are revisited, blending tradition with warmth, creating bonds across generations.

title: Kitchen Magic
desc: Kitchen Magic is full of cooking fun. Guests share easy recipes and kitchen hacks that make food tastier and cooking simpler for everyone.

title: 100 Percent Veg S02
desc: Takes viewers on a vibrant vegetarian culinary journey across India. Each episode celebrates fresh, seasonal produce with creative recipes and expert tips.

title: Swaad Aa Gaya S02
desc: Naman Kumar Arora, guided by a dietician, presents delicious and healthy recipes that promote a balanced lifestyle without sacrificing flavor and enjoyment.

title: Northern Flavours S01
desc: A culinary journey across the north brings flavors, aromas, and tales of local traditions that reveal the true richness of regional cuisines.

title: Ganga - The Soul Of India
desc: Gangaa tells the emotional journey of Ganga, who married as a child, and who grows into a strong, wise woman. Her life challenges outdated norms with courage, dignity, and unwavering spirit.

title: Norhern Flavours (Meethi Masti)
desc: Sweet delicacies from northern India unfold with rich traditions and cultural stories, blending taste, nostalgia, and heritage into an unforgettable culinary journey.

title: Station Master's Tiffin
desc: This show is an exploration of Indian Railways and its intersection with food, culture and people. Chef Ranveer Brar embarks on a journey across the 4 corners of the country on the Indian Railways.

title: The Bakers table
desc: Anchored by Tejasvi Chandela, this stress-busting show offers viewers easy-breezy hacks and recipes of scrumptious breads, biscuits, cakes and beyond.

title: Pattay Ki Baat
desc: Chef Smit Sagar travels through the aromatic lanes of various cities across India and brings you some of the most unique and delectable street food recipes.

title: Vickeypedia
desc: Chef Vicky Ratnani explores global cuisines, blending international flavors as he prepares diverse dishes inspired by cultures and culinary traditions from around the world.

title: Dakshin Diaries
desc: The host travels to the southern part of India and tries to explore the rich cultural heritage and famous local cuisines of the region.

title: Gimme Chocolate
desc: Join Indian chocolatier Zeba Kohli as she hosts celebrities for fun chats and delicious dessert tastings in this delightful show filled with sweetness and spontaneity!

desc: Chef Ranveer Brar shares recipes for quick, easy and interesting snacks for every mood and occasion. He uses a variety of snack flavours.
